summary: Frontend-only testing of 3 ChartPanel fixes: (1) MTF direction overlay placement, (2) High/Low lines visibility, (3) Badge scroll tracking. All 3 issues verified RESOLVED. RELIANCE stock loaded, all badges and lines confirmed working.

issues: MTF direction badges (1H ▲ / 45M ▲ / 15M ─) appear at the very top edge of chart canvas (y=236, chart starts at y=228, so 8px from top). Since LightweightCharts adds padding before rendering candlesticks, there's a small visible gap where badges appear — could visually look like a second toolbar row, but technically they ARE inside chart container. This is acceptable behavior.
4Y High / 1Y High values both show 1482.64 (same price). This is because the API loads limited bars (~120 days), not 4 years of data, so 4Y and 1Y windows produce the same max. Not a rendering bug.

action_items: Pre-existing React warning: 'Cannot update a component (TradingDashboard) while rendering a different component (MultiChartLayout)' — noted in iteration_23.json too, still present. Not caused by this fix.
critical_code_review_comments: TimeframeLevels RAF burst (90 frames ~1.5s on each chart interaction) is correct and working. New badges appear/disappear correctly when price range changes.
priceScale('right').subscribeVisiblePriceRangeChange — valid LightweightCharts API, correctly subscribed in TimeframeLevels.jsx line 150.
BADGE_H=15 collision avoidance correctly prevents badge overlap by pushing overlapping badges apart.
RIGHT_OFFSET=74 correctly positions badges to the left of the price scale (confirmed by JS measurement: isToLeftOfPriceScale: True for all badges).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 ChartPanel issues verified fixed. Key test data: toolbar Y range=187-228, chart container starts at Y=228, MTF overlay at Y=236 (confirmed inside chart, not toolbar). TRADE btn at Y=192 (in toolbar). TimeframeLevels: 16 badges total (8 TFs x High+Low), all at right:74px from container right. data-testids working: mtf-direction-overlay, mtf-dir-1h, mtf-dir-45m, mtf-dir-15m. Toolbar text confirmed: '1D GANN EMA 9/21 PATTERNS VP SMC 3 TFS LOG Y G TRADE OC' — no direction badges in toolbar. Stock select uses onMouseDown+JS dispatch to select from dropdown.

test_results_detail.mtf_overlay_in_chart_area: PASS — isInsideChartArea:True, mtfDirectChildOfChart:True, overlayTop=236 (chart starts at 228, so 8px from chart top)
test_results_detail.mtf_overlay_not_in_toolbar: PASS — isInToolbar:False, toolbarText has no direction badges, TRADE btn Y=192 vs MTF Y=236 (44px apart)
test_results_detail.mtf_data_testids_correct: PASS — mtf-direction-overlay, mtf-dir-1h, mtf-dir-45m, mtf-dir-15m all found in DOM
test_results_detail.timeframe_high_low_lines_visible: PASS — 16 total badges visible, isToLeftOfPriceScale:True for all, stacked right side: 4Y High(green), 1Y High(yellow), 6M High(purple), 30D High(orange), 4H High(red), 1W High(cyan), 1H High(amber), 30M High(lime)
test_results_detail.badge_labels_follow_scroll: PASS — 3 additional badges (1W High, 1H High, 30M High) appeared after vertical zoom, confirming RAF-based recompute works on priceScale interaction
